sentences.target: Ich brauche ein Visum für die Reise.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə aɪ̯n ˈviːzʊm fyːɐ̯ diː ˈʁaɪ̯zə./

translations.de: Ich brauche ein Visum für die Reise.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə aɪ̯n ˈviːzʊm fyːɐ̯ diː ˈʁaɪ̯zə./
translations.en: I need a visa for the trip.
translations.es: Necesito una visa para el viaje.
translations.fr: J'ai bisogno d'un visa pour ce voyage.
translations.it: Ho bisogno di un visto per il viaggio.
translations.pt: Preciso de um visto para a viagem.
translations.vi: Tôi cần visa cho chuyến đi này.
translations.nl: Ik heb een visum nodig voor deze reis.
translations.hi: मुझे इस यात्रा के लिए वीज़ा चाहिए.
translations.el: Χρειάζομαι βίζα για αυτό το ταξίδι.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger visum for denne reisen.
translations.id: Saya perlu visa untuk perjalanan ini.
translations.sv: Jag behöver visum för den här resan.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de viză pentru această călătorie.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for et visum til rejsen.
translations.ja: この旅行にはビザが必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; governs an accusative object.
Indefinite article; accusative singular neuter; determiner for ‘Visum’.
Common noun; neuter; accusative singular; direct object of ‘brauche’.
Preposition; governs accusative; introduces the prepositional phrase ‘für die Reise’.
Definite article; accusative singular feminine; determiner for ‘Reise’ within the PP.
Common noun; feminine; accusative singular; prepositional object governed by ‘für’.

sentences.target: Du hast dein Visum schon bekommen.

translations.de: Du hast dein Visum schon bekommen.
translations.fr: Tu as déjà obtenu ton visa.
translations.vi: Bạn đã nhận được visa rồi.
translations.nl: Je hebt je visum al gekregen.
translations.hi: तुम्हें वीज़ा पहले ही मिल गया है.
translations.el: Έχεις ήδη πάρει τη βίζα σου.
translations.nb: Du har allerede fått visumet ditt.
translations.sv: Du har redan fått ditt visum.
translations.da: Du har allerede fået dit visum.
translations.ja: もうビザを受け取った。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb; present indicative, 2nd person singular; forms the Perfekt with the participle ‘bekommen’.
Possessive determiner; accusative singular neuter; modifies ‘Visum’.
Common noun; neuter; accusative singular; direct object of the lexical verb ‘bekommen’.
Adverb; temporal aspect (‘already’); modifies the predicate.
Lexical verb in past participle; complements ‘hast’ to form the Perfekt; takes ‘dein Visum’ as its accusative object.

sentences.target: Mein Visum liegt noch beim Konsulat.

translations.de: Mein Visum liegt noch beim Konsulat.
translations.en: My visa is still at the consulate.
translations.es: Mi visa todavía está en el consulado.
translations.fr: Mon visa est toujours au consulat.
translations.it: Il mio visto è ancora al consolato.
translations.ru: Моя виза всё ещё в консульстве.
translations.pt: Meu visto ainda está no consulado.
translations.vi: Visa của tôi vẫn còn ở lãnh sự quán.
translations.nl: Mijn visum ligt nog bij het consulaat.
translations.hu: A vízumom még a konzulátuson van.
translations.hi: मेरा वीज़ा अभी भी कांसुलेट में है.
translations.pl: Moja wiza wciąż jest w konsulacie.
translations.el: Η βίζα μου είναι ακόμα στο προξενείο.
translations.nb: Visumet mitt er fortsatt på konsulatet.
translations.sv: Mitt visum är fortfarande på konsulatet.
translations.ro: Viza mea este încă la consulat.
translations.cs: Moje vízum je stále na konzulátu.
translations.da: Mit visum er stadig på konsulatet.
translations.ja: 私のビザはまだ領事館にあります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative singular neuter; modifies ‘Visum’ as subject.
Common noun; neuter; nominative singular; subject of ‘liegt’.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; denotes location/state.
Adverb; indicates continuation (‘still’).
Preposition; contraction of ‘bei dem’; governs dative; introduces the PP ‘beim Konsulat’.
Common noun; neuter; dative singular; object of the preposition ‘bei’.

sentences.target: Ich warte seit Wochen auf das Visum.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə zaɪ̯t ˈvɔxən aʊ̯f das ˈviːzʊm./

translations.de: Ich warte seit Wochen auf das Visum.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə zaɪ̯t ˈvɔxən aʊ̯f das ˈviːzʊm./
translations.en: I’ve been waiting for the visa for weeks.
translations.fr: J'attends mon visa depuis des semaines.
translations.zh-Hans: 为了签证，我已经等了好几周了。
translations.yue: 我為咗簽證已經等咗幾個星期。
translations.ru: Я жду визу уже несколько недель.
translations.pt: Estou esperando o visto há semanas.
translations.vi: Tôi đã chờ visa nhiều tuần rồi.
translations.nl: Ik wacht al weken op het visum.
translations.uk: Я чекаю на візу вже кілька тижнів.
translations.hi: मैं वीज़ा के लिए हफ्तों से इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Περιμένω τη βίζα εδώ και εβδομάδες.
translations.nb: Jeg har ventet på visum i flere uker.
translations.id: Saya sudah menunggu visa selama berminggu-minggu.
translations.sv: Jag har väntat på visum i flera veckor.
translations.da: Jeg har ventet på visum i flere uger.
translations.ja: ビザを何週間も待っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; part of the fixed verb-preposition construction ‘warten auf’.
Preposition; governs dative; marks duration/time (‘for/since’).
Common noun; feminine; dative plural; complement of ‘seit’ in the temporal PP.
Preposition required by ‘warten’; governs accusative; introduces the PP ‘auf das Visum’.
Definite article; accusative singular neuter; determiner for ‘Visum’.
Common noun; neuter; accusative singular; prepositional object of ‘auf’.
